creator: roberto@keltia.freenix.fr
text:
According to David Babler:
> sed -e 's:%PERL%:/usr/bin/perl:'  -e 's:%ROUTINE%::g'  -e 's:%INCDIR%::g'
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
This is completely wrong. Webcopy is to my knowledge a Perl5 program and
using /usr/bin/perl for it will definitely fail.

It should have a dependency on Perl5.
-- 
Ollivier ROBERT    -=- The daemon is FREE! -=-    roberto@keltia.freenix.fr
FreeBSD keltia.freenix.fr 2.2-CURRENT #25: Tue Oct 15 21:13:57 MET DST 1996
